mapper.select: SELECT uf.id, uf.user_id, uf.product_id, uf.created_time, p.name AS product_name, p.image AS product_image, p.price AS product_price, p.stock AS product_stock, p.status AS product_status FROM user_favorite uf INNER JOIN user u ON uf.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product p ON uf.product_id = p.id AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE uf.deleted = 0 AND uf.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY uf.created_time DESC
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, product_id AS productId, created_time AS createdTime FROM user_favorite WHERE deleted = 0 AND user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_favorite uf INNER JOIN user u ON uf.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 SET uf.deleted = 1 WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_favorite WHERE deleted = 0 AND product_id = #{productId}
